name: Challenger Sale
description: Evaluates teaching, tailoring, and taking control of the sales conversation.

criteria.name: Teach — Commercial Insight
criteria.description: Delivers a unique insight that reframes how the client thinks about their problem

levels.label: Adequate
levels.description: Interesting data point but doesn't reframe thinking

levels.label: Good
levels.description: Insight challenges an assumption and creates urgency

levels.label: Excellent
levels.description: Compelling reframe that makes client rethink their approach

criteria.name: Tailor — Message Resonance
criteria.description: Adapts the message to the specific stakeholder's priorities and language

levels.label: Poor
levels.description: Generic pitch, same for every audience

levels.label: Adequate
levels.description: References client's industry but not their specific role

levels.label: Good
levels.description: Message resonates with stakeholder's personal KPIs

levels.label: Excellent
levels.description: Perfectly tailored narrative that feels built just for them

criteria.name: Take Control — Constructive Tension
criteria.description: Pushes back respectfully, holds firm on value, drives the deal forward

levels.label: Poor
levels.description: Caves immediately on pushback or goes silent

levels.label: Adequate
levels.description: Holds ground but doesn't advance the conversation

levels.label: Good
levels.description: Respectful pushback that builds credibility and momentum

levels.label: Excellent
levels.description: Creates productive tension that accelerates the decision
